presets.name: Blueberry Academy
presets.description: Bulbapedia-imported trainer roster for this battle in offline archive form.
howToBeat: Keep a stable answer for crabominable, which functions as the likely closer in this roster.
Bring pressure that does not fold to the team's water core.
